questions.text: To bisect a line segment, we need:
questions.explanation: Bisecting a line segment requires a compass to draw arcs and a straightedge (ruler without markings) to draw lines.

questions.text: An angle of 60° can be constructed using compass and straightedge.
questions.explanation: A 60° angle can be constructed using compass and straightedge by constructing an equilateral triangle.

questions.text: What is the first step to construct a triangle given its base and base angles?
questions.correctAnswer: Draw the base line segment of given length.
questions.explanation: First draw the base, then construct the given angles at the endpoints, and finally complete the triangle.

questions.text: The perpendicular bisector of a chord passes through the ________ of the circle.
questions.explanation: The perpendicular bisector of any chord of a circle passes through the center of the circle.
